privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a sequence of 50 FITS image frames. The base frame is derived from a real WASP-12b calibrated observation obtained from the AstroImageJ examples page (University of Louisville). The remaining 49 frames are synthetically generated using a Python script that injects a randomized sub-pixel drift (15 to 50 pixels in both axes) via bilinear interpolation and adds Gaussian noise. No metadata claims were present in the task definition to verify.
